name: Quiet in the Office!
overview: Nayul was at her breaking point. Between the crushing workload and her detestable boss, Kwon Sijin-a man who perfected the art of trampling on dignity-she'd had enough. At 11 PM on a Friday, driven by pure rage, she stormed into his office. There, time froze. Nayul stood paralyzed, having caught her "perfect" yet perverted boss in the middle of a private, lewd act during overtime.
